semantic.role: View document describing the public API surface of the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Documents CLI entry points and their usage.
Lists MCP entry points for agent integration.
Enumerates exported modules for programmatic consumption.
Provides a consolidated reference of the external contract.
outOfScope: Internal implementation details and private APIs.
Architecture diagrams or risk hotspot analysis.
Internal module structure beyond exported interfaces.

English.purpose: To provide a consolidated reference of all publicly accessible interfaces for users and integrators of ArchSpine.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for developers, operators, and AI agents who need to understand the external contract of the ArchSpine system. It serves CLI users, MCP clients, and library consumers by enumerating every official entry point.
key_takeaways: The public surface is defined through CLI commands, MCP tools, and exported modules.
The view is regenerated with `spine sync` and remains experimental.
It acts as a contract for external interactions, highlighting what is stable and intended for consumption.
